mapper.select: SELECT S.STAY_ID, S.BIZ_NO, S.NAME, S.PHONE, S.ZIPCODE, S.ADDR, S.ADDR_DETAIL, S.DESCRIPTION, S.LAT, S.LNG, S.CHECK_IN, S.CHECK_OUT, S.PET_POLICY, S.REFUND_POLICY, S.FACILITIES, S.PET_FEE FROM TB_STAY S JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON S.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_STAY ( STAY_ID, BIZ_NO, MEMBER_NO, NAME, PHONE, ZIPCODE, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL, APPROVE_DATE, STATUS_CD ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(STAY_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_STAY), B.BIZ_NO, (SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = B.BIZ_ID OR EMAIL = B.BIZ_ID FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), B.BIZ_NAME, B.PHONE, B.ZIP_CODE, B.ADDR, B.ADDR_DETAIL, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_STAY S WHERE S.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_STAY SET NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PHONE = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDR = #{addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDR_DETAIL = #{addrDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAT = #{lat, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, LNG = #{lng, jdbcType=DOUBLE} WHERE STAY_ID = #{stayId}

UPDATE TB_STAY SET CHECK_IN = #{checkIn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHECK_OUT = #{checkOut, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAT = #{lat, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, LNG = #{lng, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, PET_FEE = #{petFee, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PET_POLICY = #{petPolicy, jdbcType=CLOB}, REFUND_POLICY = #{refundPolicy, jdbcType=CLOB}, FACILITIES = #{facilities, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE STAY_ID = #{stayId}
